question_text: From the bar chart shown below of India's poverty ratio across years, in which year was poverty the lowest?

answer_key.explanation: The shortest bar in the chart corresponds to the most recent year.
common_mistakes: Picking the earliest year as the lowest.
answer_key.related_concept: Decline in poverty ratio over time

visual.caption: Poverty ratio bar chart for India.
visual.altText: A vertical bar chart with four bars whose heights decrease from left to right across decades.
